topic: The ROP clearance that fell through the gap between your WhatsApp and your client's WhatsApp
format: Client trust story — the Sanad office that stopped daily status calls by giving clients visibility
post:
The ROP clearance your client assumed you were chasing — you assumed they had submitted the documents.

Neither of you was lying. There was just no system connecting you.

This is the failure mode that costs Sanad offices clients. Not incompetence. A gap in handoff that nobody could see because both sides were looking at different WhatsApp threads.

One Muscat Sanad office had four clearances pending simultaneously last month. Status updates lived in voice notes. Clients were calling daily. The PRO officer was working hard — just with no visibility the client could actually see.

When they moved to SmartPro Hub, every client got a portal. Simple: what was submitted, what's pending, what the next step is.

The daily calls stopped in week two.

That's not a technology story. It's a trust story.

Clients don't leave Sanad offices because government processes are slow. They leave because they feel abandoned in the middle of one.

How does your office currently update clients when a case is sitting with ROP or MOL?

Try the Sanad AI Assistant free — instant answers on work permits, visas & government fees: www.thesmartpro.io/sanad/assistant
